title: Taylor's Eye Witness Premier 9 Piece Kitchen Knife Wooden Block Set- Paring, All Purpose, Cook's, Santoku, Bread & 4 Steak Knives in Acacia Wood Holder. Full-Tang Triple Rivet. 15 Year Guarantee
features: ✅ SET - This Classic 9 piece Knife Set from Taylor's Eye Witness includes: Paring, All Purpose, Cook's, Santoku, Bread & 4 Steak Knives. The high quality taper ground stainless steel makes the blades easy to sharpen and difficult to blunt - helping to retain blade sharpness over time. Featuring traditional full-tang, triple rivet construction for strength, durability and balance. Set is presented in an exceptionally stylish Acacia Wood Block. Would make the ideal wedding or anniversary gift.

✅ STRENGTH - Each knife in this large and complete set is “full tang” meaning it is constructed of one solid piece of steel running from the butt of the handle to the knife’s point. Ensuring the handle cannot become detached from the blade during heavy duty tasks, giving it a prolonged lifetime. A full tang knife is heavier, but distribution of weight is what’s important. Full tang knives are better balanced for improved leverage capabilities, minimising fatigue and increasing chopping speed.

✅ SUPREME QUALITY STEEL BLADES - Built with razor sharp, laser-tested, tapered knife edges, ground to form an exacting angle to ensure maximum cutting performance and durability. Forged from high quality taper ground Stainless Steel, harder than normal knife steel, holding the sharp edge for longer.

✅ USE - This multifaceted product, is a must for any keen chef. It Includes: a Paring Knife - ideal for the preparation of fruit & vegetables. An All-Purpose Knife - perfect for everyday slicing and chopping. A Santoku Knife - a general purpose knife ideal for slicing, dicing & mincing. A Bread Knife that has sharp, serrated edges & can cut soft bread without crushing it. A Cook's Knife - used for slicing/chopping vegetables & meat. 4 Steak Knives - for when dining on that perfectly cooked steak

✅ 15 YEAR GUARANTEE - This Taylor's Eye Witness product is covered by a no quibble 15 Year Guarantee. Any item found defective will be repaired or replaced without charge. We fully protect the consumer's statutory rights. Furthermore, this fashionably presented, modern 9 piece Knife Block Set is exceptional quality at an affordable price. Understated yet elegant for that ultimate dining experience. Presented in its own sleek gift box, which allows you to give to someone on a special occasion.

STRENGTH Each knife in this large and complete set is “full tang riveted” meaning it is constructed of one solid piece of steel running from the butt of the handle to the knife’s point with rivets on either side of the blade on the handle. STYLISH DESIGN The bold black colour with the traditional Acacia wood block won't look out of place in any home or professional kitchen.
